results.title: Iconic Kenosha eatery Frank's Diner announces new owners
results.description: For 100 years, Frank's Diner has become more than just a spot to eat, it's become an institution in Kenosha. The long-standing institution in Kenosha will soon have new owners.

results.title: How can the City Council help bring more housing to York? UNL Rural Fellow answers
results.description: The City of Columbus invested $2 million into a workforce housing subdivision called Vitality Village. Ben Bentzinger recommended that York consider a similar investment.

results.title: Government spends less than half of development budget
results.description: KATHMANDU, July 18: The government spent less than half of its allocated development budget in the last fiscal year, highlighting the continued weakness in capital expenditure despite repeated promises of improvement. According to the Office of the Financial Comptroller General, capital spending reached only 46.79 per cent of the allocated budget by the end of [...] The post Government spends less than half of development budget appeared first on Peoples' Review .
